headline: Is Equifax (EFX) Offering Value After A 23% One Year Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Equifax at US$183.79 is offering fair value or not, it helps to step back and look at what the recent share price and fundamentals are really telling you. The stock has seen a 4.1% decline over the past week, a 4.7% decline over the past month, and is down 14.1% year to date and 23.5% over the past year. These moves may have changed how the market is pricing its future potential and risks. Recent coverage has focused on Equifax's position in credit reporting and...
